SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2008 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT TO PROVIDED ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO THE COURT NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 1, 2008. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
